query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds, overOdds, underOdds, awayML, homeML FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-13' AND sport = 'NCAAM' AND awaySpreadOdds IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayBookSpread, awaySpreadOdds, homeSpreadOdds, overOdds, underOdds, awayML, homeML FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-13' AND sport = 'NCAAM' AND awaySpreadOdds IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
